RegLoan Bank — Auto Loan Credit Application Document APP-0032 Page 1 of 1 Applicant Name: Lena Silva Date of Birth: 15/01/1980 SSN (tokenized): TKN-405921 Annual Income: $89,000 Employer: Initech Loan Amount: $51,000 Term (months): 36 Branch: Leeds Collateral (Vehicle) VIN Make Model Year Fuel Cond Value ($) VIN68908AL BMW Sportage 2024 EV Used 28,000 VIN50896AL Tesla F-150 2018 ICE New 19,000 Authorized Signature: Lena Silva
